questions.text: The principal value branch of sinвҒ»В№x is:
questions.explanation: For the sine function to be invertible, its domain is restricted to [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], which becomes the range (principal branch) of sinвҒ»В№x.

questions.text: The domain of the function cosвҒ»В№x is:
questions.explanation: The cosine function takes values between -1 and 1, so the inverse function is defined for x in [-1, 1].

questions.text: The principal value of cosвҒ»В№(-1/2) is:
questions.explanation: cos(2ПҖ/3) = cos(ПҖ - ПҖ/3) = -cos(ПҖ/3) = -1/2. 2ПҖ/3 lies in the principal branch [0, ПҖ].

questions.text: The value of sinвҒ»В№(sin(2ПҖ/3)) is:
questions.explanation: 2ПҖ/3 is not in the principal branch [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2]. sin(2ПҖ/3) = sin(ПҖ - ПҖ/3) = sin(ПҖ/3). So sinвҒ»В№(sin(ПҖ/3)) = ПҖ/3.

questions.text: The range of tanвҒ»В№x is:
questions.explanation: The tangent function is undefined at ВұПҖ/2, so the principal branch of its inverse is the open interval (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2).

questions.text: The value of tanвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) - secвҒ»В№(-2) is:
questions.explanation: tanвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) = ПҖ/3. secвҒ»В№(-2) = ПҖ - secвҒ»В№(2) = ПҖ - ПҖ/3 = 2ПҖ/3. ПҖ/3 - 2ПҖ/3 = -ПҖ/3.

questions.text: The domain of secвҒ»В№x is:
questions.explanation: The secant function's range is (-вҲһ, -1] вҲӘ [1, вҲһ), which becomes the domain of secвҒ»В№x.

questions.text: Which of the following is the principal value branch of cosecвҒ»В№x?
questions.explanation: The cosecant function is not defined at 0, so it is excluded from the principal branch.

questions.text: The value of sin(ПҖ/3 - sinвҒ»В№(-1/2)) is:
questions.explanation: sinвҒ»В№(-1/2) = -ПҖ/6. sin(ПҖ/3 - (-ПҖ/6)) = sin(ПҖ/3 + ПҖ/6) = sin(ПҖ/2) = 1.

questions.text: tanвҒ»В№(1) + cosвҒ»В№(-1/2) + sinвҒ»В№(-1/2) is equal to:
If sinвҒ»В№x = y, then:
questions.explanation: This defines the principal value branch of the inverse sine function.

questions.text: The value of tanвҒ»В№(tan(3ПҖ/4)) is:
questions.explanation: 3ПҖ/4 is not in (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2). tan(3ПҖ/4) = tan(ПҖ - ПҖ/4) = -tan(ПҖ/4) = tan(-ПҖ/4). So result is -ПҖ/4.

questions.text: The principal value of cotвҒ»В№(-вҲҡ3) is:
questions.explanation: cotвҒ»В№(-x) = ПҖ - cotвҒ»В№x. ПҖ - cotвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) = ПҖ - ПҖ/6 = 5ПҖ/6.

questions.text: The domain of sinвҒ»В№(2x) is:
questions.explanation: -1 вүӨ 2x вүӨ 1 implies -1/2 вүӨ x вүӨ 1/2.

questions.text: The value of cosвҒ»В№(cos(7ПҖ/6)) is:
questions.explanation: 7ПҖ/6 > ПҖ. cos(7ПҖ/6) = cos(2ПҖ - 5ПҖ/6) = cos(5ПҖ/6). 5ПҖ/6 lies in [0, ПҖ].

questions.text: sin(tanвҒ»В№x), |x| < 1, is equal to:
questions.explanation: Let Оё = tanвҒ»В№x, so tanОё = x/1. Opposite = x, Adjacent = 1, Hypotenuse = вҲҡ(1+xВІ). sinОё = x/вҲҡ(1+xВІ).

questions.text: The value of cot(tanвҒ»В№a + cotвҒ»В№a) is:
questions.explanation: tanвҒ»В№x + cotвҒ»В№x = ПҖ/2. cot(ПҖ/2) = 0.

questions.text: If sinвҒ»В№(1-x) - 2sinвҒ»В№x = ПҖ/2, then x is equal to:
questions.explanation: Substituting x=0 satisfies the equation. x=1/2 gives -ПҖ/6 which is not ПҖ/2.

questions.text: The principal value of cosвҒ»В№(1/2) + 2sinвҒ»В№(1/2) is:
The value of tanвҒ»В№[2cos(2sinвҒ»В№(1/2))] is:
Which property is true for inverse trigonometric functions?
questions.explanation: sinвҒ»В№ is an odd function. cosвҒ»В№(-x) = ПҖ - cosвҒ»В№x.

questions.text: The value of tanвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) - cotвҒ»В№(-вҲҡ3) is:
Domain of cosвҒ»В№(2x-1) is:
questions.explanation: -1 вүӨ 2x-1 вүӨ 1 implies 0 вүӨ 2x вүӨ 2, so 0 вүӨ x вүӨ 1.

questions.text: Range of the function f(x) = sinвҒ»В№x + cosвҒ»В№x + tanвҒ»В№x is:
questions.explanation: f(x) = ПҖ/2 + tanвҒ»В№x. Since domain is [-1, 1], tanвҒ»В№x is in [-ПҖ/4, ПҖ/4]. Range is [ПҖ/2-ПҖ/4, ПҖ/2+ПҖ/4] = [ПҖ/4, 3ПҖ/4].

questions.text: The value of sinвҒ»В№(cos(33ПҖ/5)) is:
questions.explanation: 33ПҖ/5 = 6ПҖ + 3ПҖ/5. cos(33ПҖ/5) = cos(3ПҖ/5). sinвҒ»В№(sin(ПҖ/2 - 3ПҖ/5)) = sinвҒ»В№(sin(-ПҖ/10)) = -ПҖ/10.

questions.text: cot(sinвҒ»В№x) is equal to:
questions.explanation: If sinОё = x, then cotОё = cosОё/sinОё = вҲҡ(1-xВІ)/x.

questions.text: Inverse trigonometric functions are also known as:
questions.explanation: Cyclometric functions is a less common term for inverse trig functions.

questions.text: The principal value of cosecвҒ»В№(2) is:
questions.explanation: cosec(ПҖ/6) = 2 and ПҖ/6 is in the valid range.

questions.text: The value of sinвҒ»В№(-вҲҡ3/2) is:
questions.explanation: sinвҒ»В№(-x) = -sinвҒ»В№x. -sinвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3/2) = -ПҖ/3.

questions.text: If tanвҒ»В№x + tanвҒ»В№y = ПҖ/4, then x + y + xy is:
questions.explanation: (x+y)/(1-xy) = tan(ПҖ/4) = 1. So x+y = 1-xy => x+y+xy = 1.

questions.text: The function sinвҒ»В№x is increasing in its domain.
questions.explanation: The derivative 1/вҲҡ(1-xВІ) is always positive in (-1, 1).

questions.text: The value of cosвҒ»В№(cos(-ПҖ/4)) is:
questions.explanation: cos(-Оё) = cosОё. cosвҒ»В№(cos(ПҖ/4)) = ПҖ/4.

questions.text: cosвҒ»В№(1/2) - 2sinвҒ»В№(-1/2) is:
The domain of f(x) = sinвҒ»В№x + cos x is:
questions.explanation: The intersection of domains of sinвҒ»В№x ([-1, 1]) and cos x (R) is [-1, 1].

questions.text: The value of tan(cosвҒ»В№(4/5) + tanвҒ»В№(2/3)) is:
If cos(sinвҒ»В№(2/5) + cosвҒ»В№x) = 0, then x is:
questions.explanation: sinвҒ»В№(2/5) + cosвҒ»В№x must be ПҖ/2. This happens when x = 2/5.

questions.text: The principal value of tanвҒ»В№(-1) is:
questions.explanation: tan(-ПҖ/4) = -1 and -ПҖ/4 lies in the principal range (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2).

questions.text: Domain of the function f(x) = вҲҡ(sinвҒ»В№x) is:
questions.explanation: sinвҒ»В№x must be вүҘ 0 and x must be in [-1, 1]. sinвҒ»В№x вүҘ 0 implies x вүҘ 0.

questions.text: Which of the following is the principal value of secвҒ»В№(вҲҡ2)?
questions.explanation: sec(ПҖ/4) = вҲҡ2 and ПҖ/4 is in the principal branch.

questions.text: The value of cotвҒ»В№(cot(5ПҖ/4)) is:
questions.explanation: cot(5ПҖ/4) = cot(ПҖ + ПҖ/4) = cot(ПҖ/4). So result is ПҖ/4, which is in (0, ПҖ).
